'''''Star Wars'' 6''' is the sixth issue in the ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' series of comics. It was published on [[May 19]], [[1999]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]]

==Publisher's summary==
''As Ki races to save his daughter from the clutches of the vile gangster Jabba the Hutt, he inadvertently discovers that the Hutt crime lord is secretly procuring munitions for a war fleet massing in orbit above Tatooine. Suddenly, Ki's problems on his homeworld of Cerea seem very small indeed!''

==Plot summary==
As Jabba's fighters scramble to intercept Ki-Adi-Mundi, his daughter and her companion wait, terrified, for their rescue. Ki uses a clever feint to ditch his ship and go after the girls just as Jabba launches a shuttle full of contraband bound for a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] rendezvous. After being reunited with his daughter, Ki returns to Cerea, only to find his formerly infertile honor-wife pregnant. This arc closes with the appointment of Ki-Adi-Mundi to the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]].
